perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action concert footage. Jennie performs on stage wearing a white puffer jacket and shorts with fire pyrotechnics erupting behind her. (2) Scene shifts to Jennie in a black and white corset outfit, performing a choreographed sequence along a metal railing. (3) Transitions to Jennie in a black leather outfit, smiling and waving to the audience while performing. (4) Shows Jennie and Lisa together on stage in casual black outfits, performing a synchronized dance. (5) Jennie is seen in a maroon fringed top and leather shorts, dancing energetically with male and female backup dancers. (6) The final phase shows Jennie in a white graphic t-shirt and mini-skirt, performing a closing song and then bowing deeply toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music begins with prominent synth melodies and a heavy drum beat. Female vocals are heard rapping and singing with an excited, rhythmic tone. (2) The music shifts to a melodic pop chorus with layered vocal harmonies and a steady bassline. (3) A dance break occurs with a heavy focus on percussion and bass beats. (4) The soundscape changes to a more vocal-driven pop track with clear, high-pitched singing over a lighter accompaniment. (5) Ends with high-tempo pop music integrated with loud crowd cheering and applause.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Jennie 2025 高雄場' - Identifies the artist and event location. (2) Hook Text: '這首每次都超辣!' - Expresses enthusiastic praise for the performance. (3) Decorative Text: '根本是仙女下凡' - Admirational comment comparing the artist to a fairy. (4) Decorative Text: '好頑皮好可愛' - Playful observation of the artist's stage persona. (5) Functional Text: 'Nini 愛心光波' and '大愛心!' - Labels for fan-service gestures made by the artist. (6) Decorative Text: '笑起來也太像水豚了' - A humorous, endearing comparison of the artist's smile. (7) Hook Text: '真的太好聽...' and '這段好好看!' - Explicit expressions of appreciation for the audio and visuals. (8) Functional Text: '下次見... 我會想你的' - A warm, final farewell message.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: A fast-paced montage of concert performance highlights and fan interactions.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main artist (Jennie), 3 other group members (Lisa, Rosé, Jisoo), approx. 10 backup dancers, and a large crowd in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Jennie, a woman with long dark hair, wearing various stylish stage outfits including puffer jackets, corsets, fringe tops, and graphic t-shirts, often accessorized with sunglasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A massive concert stage with professional lighting arrays, large LED screens displaying graphics, pyrotechnic fire effects, and a sea of fans holding lightsticks.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights, neon pink/red hues, and spotlights.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a celebratory highlight reel of Jennie's solo and group performance during a concert in Kaohsiung. It aims to capture the high-energy atmosphere of the event, showcase her versatile fashion and stage presence, and share intimate fan-service moments with a wider social media audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the artist wearing clothing with brand logos and performing at a major branded tour event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-fashion stage wear combined with signature K-pop idol fan interactions (heart gestures).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fan-captured footage (fan-cam) style which enhances the sense of authenticity and closeness to the artist.
